case_title: RAPP, ANN vs. SALEL, MANDALA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAPP, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT SALEL, MANDALA TREZVANT, FRED DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TREZVANT, FRED ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SALEL, MANDALA TREZVANT, FRED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SALEL, MANDALA TREZVANT, FRED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAPP, ANN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-30-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

P/T JUDGE FRANK MCKEON, RPTR. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. DENNIS C. HYDE DEFT'S. IN PRO PERS 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT. PLTF. WILL DISMISS W/PREJUDICE IN CONDITONS MET: THAT WATER BILL WILL BE CURRENT AND PAY $150.00 WITHIN 7 DAYS OF BILL DATED 11/5/94. DEFT. TO VACATE BY 1/8/95 AND PAY WATER BILL OF 12/10/94.THERE IS NO OTHER OCCUPANT. DEFT. TO PAY $1,500.00. BROOM CLEAN. DEFT. FORFEIT SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT. NO STAY OF EVICTION. PLTF. MAY MOVE VIA EXPARTE MOTION. NOTICE TO PHONE #207-7230. RENT THRU 1/8/95 IS $1,946.80. SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1,000.00 PLUS INTEREST IS FORFEITED. LANDLORD NOT TO CALL DEFT. EMPLOYMENT. DEFT. COOPERATE TO SHOW HOUSE. ALL PRESENT. PLTF. GETS RESTITUTION OF PREMISES.ATTY. FEES $500.00. COSTS 130.00. FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT. DEFT. TO KEEP SCANVENGER BILL CURRENT WITHIN 7 DAYS.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, DECLARATION & STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEL, MANDALA TREZVANT, FRED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 481 BENTON AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,541.63 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,171.63, STAYED UNTIL JAN-09-1995, LEASE FORFEITED
